arts.ttl: ‘As we feared’ – Frank Lampard confirms major Coventry City injury blow
arts.sum: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard has confirmed Oliver Dovin has suffered an ACL injury with surgery planned. Coventry… The post ‘As we feared’ – Frank Lampard confirms major Coventry City injury blow appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard provides 'disappointing' injury update on Coventry City goalkeeper Oliver Dovin
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has provided a hugely disappointing injury update on Oliver Dovin, revealing that the first choice Coventry City goalkeeper has suffered an anterior cruciate knee ligament rupture (ACL), which means the player will require surgery and a lengthy spell on the sidelines. Paying tribute to Dovin's progress as a player in the short time he's been with the Sky Blues, he said: “He’s had an incredible season, personally, the strides he’s taken since we’ve been here, making the Sweden squad makes it even slightly more bitter in a funny way because he’s doing so well.

arts.ttl: 'Stop-start': Why Burnley boss Scott Parker has 'sympathy' for out-of-favour winger Luca Koleosho

arts.sum: Scott Parker insists there’s only excitement and no trepidation among his Burnley squad as they head into their decisive final seven games of the season.
